hero.label: // Strategic partner
hero.sub: Knock Labs combines marketing, technology, design and legal advisory in one team. For businesses that want to scale without fragmenting providers.

items.title: Diagnosis
items.desc: We audit your current situation and define a clear strategy.

items.title: Proposal
items.desc: We design a tailored plan with the pillars you need.

items.title: Execution
items.desc: Our team works as an extension of yours.

items.title: Scale
items.desc: We iterate, measure and grow with you month by month.

items.title: Marketing 360°
items.desc: Digital strategy, SEM, SEO, Social Ads, Growth Hacking.

items.title: Technology
items.desc: Websites, apps, SaaS, automation and cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Legal & Finance
items.desc: Legal, tax, financial modelling and due diligence.

items.title: Design
items.desc: Brand identity, UX/UI, design thinking and creative direction.

about.label: // About
about.body: Knock Labs was born in Barcelona with a simple idea: businesses that want to scale deserve an integrated team, without fragmentation or endless contracts. We combine six disciplines under one roof so you can focus on what matters — growing your business.

contact.label: // Contact
contact.title: Tell us about your project.
contact.sub: No commitments. No long contracts. Just a conversation.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Write to us directly.
contact.consent: I've read and accept the <link>privacy policy</link>.
contact.consent_error: You must accept the privacy policy.

values.title: No fragmentation
values.desc: One team that talks to itself. No juggling five different providers.

values.title: Real involvement
values.desc: We dive into every project as if it were our own business.

values.title: Results, not reports
values.desc: Reports are a by-product. What matters is the impact on your business.

services_intro.body: We don't sell packaged bundles. We assemble the team your project needs from six pillars working together under one roof.
